SHORT NAME: MC_ENT_GOVT_PCT 

LONG NAME: MC_ENT_GOVT_PCT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: Values are 0 through 100 or Null/missing 

COMMENT: The value was chosen using the last-best method for values from the monthly TAF (calendar year). 

Guidance to plans was to include Medicaid and Medicare in calculation of percentage of business in
